I1.name: ExternalBenchmark Abstraction Layer
I1.description: ExternalBenchmark trait + BenchmarkVerifier + BenchmarkRegistry + CLI integration

I2.name: GAIA Benchmark Adapter
I2.description: GAIA multi-step reasoning benchmark: 50 tasks, L1-L3, ExactMatch scoring

I3.name: SWE-bench Adapter
I3.description: SWE-bench Lite: 50 tasks, Docker sandbox verification, mock fallback

I4.name: τ-bench Adapter
I4.description: τ-bench tool-use reliability: 30 tasks, pass^k consistency metric

I5.name: Verification & Integration
I5.description: ScoreDetails variants + CLI update + CI + full test run

design_changes.reason: Expanded from SWE-bench-only to multi-benchmark adaptation layer
design_changes.scope: Added GAIA (Level 3 multi-step reasoning) + τ-bench (Level 3 tool consistency) + ExternalBenchmark abstraction
